languages.text: "Ту часть, где у нее слабое место, она в корнях прячет. И вот до этой части почти не пробиться — если не разозлить ее, и она сама не вылезет. Так что сначала вы познакомитесь с ее отростками в броне. Они разные бывают, мы их прозвали баррикадами, булавами, наростами и цветами. По повадкам".

traits.locale_text: "Ту часть, где у нее слабое место, она в корнях прячет. И вот до этой части почти не пробиться — если не разозлить ее, и она сама не вылезет. Так что сначала вы познакомитесь с ее отростками в броне. Они разные бывают, мы их прозвали баррикадами, булавами, наростами и цветами. По повадкам".

languages.text: "It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."
languages.original_text: "Ту часть, где у нее слабое место, она в корнях прячет. И вот до этой части почти не пробиться — если не разозлить ее, и она сама не вылезет. Так что сначала вы познакомитесь с ее отростками в броне. Они разные бывают, мы их прозвали баррикадами, булавами, наростами и цветами. По повадкам".

traits.locale_text: "It keeps its soft spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get to that part — unless you make it angry and it chooses to come out. So first, you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we call them differently based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

"It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

"The Drover is a cunning creature. It hides its brain in the roots — or whatever it has instead of a brain. Its vulnerability, in short. And it's almost impossible to get to that part — unless you make it angry and it chooses to come out. So first of all, you'll have to face its shoots in bone armour. We call them barricades, maces, growths, and flowers. Listen carefully, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — this knowledge has been bought with blood. And not just the blood of Call-Ups past, but ours as well."

"It keeps its soft spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get to that part — unless you make it angry and it chooses to come out. So first, you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we call them differently based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

"It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

"It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

languages.text: 「ドローバーは狡猾な生き物だ。脳──あるいは脳の代わりになる何か──を根の中に隠している。要するに、そこが弱点だ。だが、本体を怒らせて出てこさせない限り、その部位にたどり着くのはほとんど不可能だ。だからまず相対するのは、骨の鎧をまとった“芽”になる。私たちはそれらをバリケード、メイス、瘤、そして花と呼んでいる。よくお聞きください、閣下──この知識は血で買われたものです。過去の召集の者たちの血だけでなく、私たち自身の血でも」
languages.original_text: "The Drover is a cunning creature. It hides its brain in the roots — or whatever it has instead of a brain. Its vulnerability, in short. And it's almost impossible to get to that part — unless you make it angry and it chooses to come out. So first of all, you'll have to face its shoots in bone armour. We call them barricades, maces, growths, and flowers. Listen carefully, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — this knowledge has been bought with blood. And not just the blood of Call-Ups past, but ours as well."

traits.locale_text: 「ドローバーは狡猾な生き物だ。脳──あるいは脳の代わりになる何か──を根の中に隠している。要するに、そこが弱点だ。だが、本体を怒らせて出てこさせない限り、その部位にたどり着くのはほとんど不可能だ。だからまず相対するのは、骨の鎧をまとった“芽”になる。私たちはそれらをバリケード、メイス、瘤、そして花と呼んでいる。よくお聞きください、閣下──この知識は血で買われたものです。過去の召集の者たちの血だけでなく、私たち自身の血でも。」

languages.text: « Il cache ses points faibles dans ses racines. Il est presque impossible de les atteindre, à moins de l'énerver au point qu'il décide de se montrer. Pour commencer, vous devrez donc vous occuper de ses drageons en armure. Il en existe différentes sortes, et nous leur avons donné des noms en fonction de leur comportement : barricades, masses, ergots et fleurs. »
languages.original_text: "It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

traits.locale_text: « Il cache ses points faibles dans ses racines. Il est presque impossible de les atteindre, à moins de l'énerver au point qu'il décide de se montrer. Pour commencer, vous devrez donc vous occuper de ses drageons en armure. Il en existe différentes sortes, et nous leur avons donné des noms en fonction de leur comportement : barricades, masses, ergots et fleurs. »

languages.text: "Zayıf noktasını köklerin arasında gözden uzak tutuyor. Oraya ulaşmak neredeyse imkânsız... Onu oradan çıkacak kadar kızdırmamız gerekiyor. Yani önce zırhlı filizleriyle başa çıkılmalı. Farklı türlerde filizler var, davranış biçimlerine göre farklı isimler verdik: Barikatlar, gürzler, urlar ve çiçekler."
languages.original_text: "It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

traits.locale_text: "Zayıf noktasını köklerin arasında gözden uzak tutuyor. Oraya ulaşmak neredeyse imkânsız... Onu oradan çıkacak kadar kızdırmamız gerekiyor. Yani önce zırhlı filizleriyle başa çıkılmalı. Farklı türlerde filizler var, davranış biçimlerine göre farklı isimler verdik: Barikatlar, gürzler, urlar ve çiçekler."

languages.text: «Oculta su punto débil entre las raíces. Es casi imposible llegar hasta él, a menos que consiga provocarlo para que salga a la superficie. Por tanto, lo primero es enfrentarse a sus brotes acorazados. Los hay de varios tipos, y les hemos puesto nombres en función de su comportamiento: barricadas, mazas, pupas y flores».
languages.original_text: "It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

traits.locale_text: «Oculta su punto débil entre las raíces. Es casi imposible llegar hasta él, a menos que consiga provocarlo para que salga a la superficie. Por tanto, lo primero es enfrentarse a sus brotes acorazados. Los hay de varios tipos, y les hemos puesto nombres en función de su comportamiento: barricadas, mazas, pupas y flores».

languages.text: “它将自己的弱点隐藏在根系里。除非你把它逼急了，让它自己出来，否则几乎不可能打中那里。所以我们需要先对付它那些带护甲的芽条。这些东西有好几种类型，我们根据它们的特性起了不同的名字：路障、藤锤、增生体和花。”
languages.original_text: "It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

traits.locale_text: “它将自己的弱点隐藏在根系里。除非你把它逼急了，让它自己出来，否则几乎不可能打中那里。所以我们需要先对付它那些带护甲的芽条。这些东西有好几种类型，我们根据它们的特性起了不同的名字：路障、藤锤、增生体和花。”

languages.text: "Er verbirgt seine Schwachstelle zwischen den Wurzeln. Und es ist nahezu unmöglich, ihn zu erreichen ... es sei denn, man reizt ihn, bis er herauskommt. Ihr müsst Euch also erst mit seinen gepanzerten Trieben befassen. Es gibt verschiedene davon. Wir haben ihnen abhängig von ihrem Verhalten Namen gegeben: Barrikaden, Blüten, Auswüchse und Blumen."
languages.original_text: "It keeps its weak spot out of sight among the roots. And it's almost impossible to get there — unless you make it angry enough that it comes out. So first you'll have to deal with its armoured shoots. There're different kinds of them and we've given them different names based on how they act: barricades, maces, growths, and flowers."

traits.locale_text: "Er verbirgt seine Schwachstelle zwischen den Wurzeln. Und es ist nahezu unmöglich, ihn zu erreichen ... es sei denn, man reizt ihn, bis er herauskommt. Ihr müsst Euch also erst mit seinen gepanzerten Trieben befassen. Es gibt verschiedene davon. Wir haben ihnen abhängig von ihrem Verhalten Namen gegeben: Barrikaden, Blüten, Auswüchse und Blumen."
